name: Operations Manual Template
tagline: How your business runs, documented once — so it doesn't live only in your head.
differentiator: Includes a real SOP section and emergency contacts table, not just a generic "processes" placeholder — built to actually hand to someone you hire.
description: Document your roles, tools & access, recurring checklists, communication protocol, SOPs, and emergency contacts in one place — the manual that lets you delegate without re-explaining everything from scratch.
whoFor: Solo operators about to hire their first contractor or employee, and don't want to be the single point of failure.
